_note: Unified job-free DCL mechanism sentinel clean v1. It retains the affinity-corrected physical, magic, status, lifecycle, multistrike, Taunt, Reaction, and Interrupt mechanisms, adds the live-proven post-movement final-tile producer, and removes every retired mid-route Approach and Fear compatibility setting. It assigns no job, authors no final-tile ability, and contains no final balance values.
DclDamageFormula: if(t.charId == 31 && dcl.nativeMpDebitResult && dcl.oldDebit == 0 && dcl.oldMpDebit > 1, max(1, dcl.oldMpDebit - min(t.mp, max(1, dcl.oldMpDebit / 2))), if(action.abilityId == 101, ability.dcl.power * dcl.strike.normalHitCount + mulDiv(ability.dcl.power, 3, 2) * dcl.strike.criticalCount, if(dcl.isMagicDamage, if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, if(dcl.magicAbsorbedResolved || dcl.targetNullResolved, 0, dcl.magicAmountResolved), 0), if(action.type == 1 && action.abilityId == 0, if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, dcl.weaponModel, 0), if(dcl.isMagicHeal && t.status.undead, if(dcl.nativeHpCreditResult, dcl.magicAmountResolved, 0), if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, dcl.oldDebit, 0))))))
DclAttackSkillFormula: if(action.abilityId == 101, 12 - dcl.strike.index, dcl.weaponSkill + dcl.zodiacHitModifier + dcl.pointBlank * const.dclPointBlankSkillModifier)

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.weaponSkillInvestmentMilli
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: 2500 * max(0, a.jobLevel - 1) + mulDiv(250 * max(1, a.jobLevel), max(0, a.level - 1), 8)

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.hasSwordMaster
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: a.supportAbilityId == const.dclSwordMasterAbilityId || a.innateAbilityId1 == const.dclSwordMasterAbilityId || a.innateAbilityId2 == const.dclSwordMasterAbilityId || a.innateAbilityId3 == const.dclSwordMasterAbilityId || a.innateAbilityId4 == const.dclSwordMasterAbilityId

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.rightWeaponFamily
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(aslot.rightweapon.itemId == 0 || aslot.rightweapon.category_none, 0, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_knife, 1, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_ninjablade, 2, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_sword, 3, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_knightsword, 4, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_fellsword, 5, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_katana, 6, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_axe, 7, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_flail, 8, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_rod, 9, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_staff, 10, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_pole, 11, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_polearm, 12, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_crossbow, 13, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_bow, 14, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_gun, 15, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_book, 16, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_instrument, 17, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_bag, 18, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_cloth, 19, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_throwing, 20, if(aslot.rightweapon.category_bomb, 21, -1))))))))))))))))))))))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.leftWeaponFamily
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(aslot.leftweapon.itemId == 0 || aslot.leftweapon.category_none, 0, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_knife, 1, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_ninjablade, 2, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_sword, 3, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_knightsword, 4, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_fellsword, 5, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_katana, 6, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_axe, 7, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_flail, 8, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_rod, 9, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_staff, 10, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_pole, 11, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_polearm, 12, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_crossbow, 13, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_bow, 14, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_gun, 15, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_book, 16, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_instrument, 17, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_bag, 18, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_cloth, 19, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_throwing, 20, if(aslot.leftweapon.category_bomb, 21, -1))))))))))))))))))))))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.base
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(dcl.isThrust || dcl.isUnarmed, tableClamp(gurpsThr, dcl.st), tableClamp(gurpsSw, dcl.st))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.weightTotal
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.weightHead + dcl.weightBody + dcl.weightAccessory + dcl.weightRightWeapon + dcl.weightRightShield + dcl.weightLeftWeapon + dcl.weightLeftShield

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.dodge
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: max(3, const.dclDodgeBase + mulDiv(t.physEva, 1, const.dclEvadePctPerDodgePoint) + mulDiv(tslot.accessory.accessoryPhysicalEvasion, 1, const.dclEvadePctPerDodgePoint) - dcl.dodgeWeightPenalty)

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.sourceDirection
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(!dcl.facingSeparated, t.facing, if(abs(dcl.facingDx) > abs(dcl.facingDy), if(dcl.facingDx > 0, 3, 1), if(dcl.facingDy > 0, 2, 0)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetWeaponSkillInvestmentMilli
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: 2500 * max(0, t.jobLevel - 1) + mulDiv(250 * max(1, t.jobLevel), max(0, t.level - 1), 8)

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetWeaponFamily
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(tslot.rightweapon.itemId == 0 || tslot.rightweapon.category_none, 0, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_knife, 1, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_ninjablade, 2, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_sword, 3, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_knightsword, 4, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_fellsword, 5, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_katana, 6, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_axe, 7, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_flail, 8, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_rod, 9, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_staff, 10, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_pole, 11, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_polearm, 12, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_crossbow, 13, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_bow, 14, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_gun, 15, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_book, 16, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_instrument, 17, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_bag, 18, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_cloth, 19, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_throwing, 20, if(tslot.rightweapon.category_bomb, 21, -1))))))))))))))))))))))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.isElemental
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isMagicDamage && !dcl.isSpiritual && (dcl.elementFire || dcl.elementIce || dcl.elementLightning || dcl.elementWind || dcl.elementEarth || dcl.elementWater)

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetAbsorb
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && t.element.absorb.fire) || (dcl.elementIce && t.element.absorb.ice) || (dcl.elementLightning && t.element.absorb.lightning) || (dcl.elementWind && t.element.absorb.wind) || (dcl.elementEarth && t.element.absorb.earth) || (dcl.elementWater && t.element.absorb.water))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetNull
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && t.element.null.fire) || (dcl.elementIce && t.element.null.ice) || (dcl.elementLightning && t.element.null.lightning) || (dcl.elementWind && t.element.null.wind) || (dcl.elementEarth && t.element.null.earth) || (dcl.elementWater && t.element.null.water))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetHalve
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && t.element.halve.fire) || (dcl.elementIce && t.element.halve.ice) || (dcl.elementLightning && t.element.halve.lightning) || (dcl.elementWind && t.element.halve.wind) || (dcl.elementEarth && t.element.halve.earth) || (dcl.elementWater && t.element.halve.water))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetWeak
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && (t.element.weak.fire || t.status.oil)) || (dcl.elementIce && t.element.weak.ice) || (dcl.elementLightning && t.element.weak.lightning) || (dcl.elementWind && t.element.weak.wind) || (dcl.elementEarth && t.element.weak.earth) || (dcl.elementWater && t.element.weak.water))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetStrong
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && t.element.strengthen.fire) || (dcl.elementIce && t.element.strengthen.ice) || (dcl.elementLightning && t.element.strengthen.lightning) || (dcl.elementWind && t.element.strengthen.wind) || (dcl.elementEarth && t.element.strengthen.earth) || (dcl.elementWater && t.element.strengthen.water))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.elementPermille
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(dcl.targetNull, 0, if(dcl.targetHalve, const.dclAffinityHalvePermille, if(dcl.targetWeak, const.dclAffinityWeakPermille, if(dcl.targetStrong, const.dclAffinityStrongPermille, 1000))))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.magicMa
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(dcl.isMagicBolt, a.rawMa + dcl.magicBoltMod, if(dcl.isMagicHeal, a.rawMa + dcl.supportMagicMod, if(dcl.isMagicDamage, a.rawMa + dcl.offensiveMagicMod, a.rawMa)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetAbsorbResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbFire, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_fire || tslot.body.absorb_fire || tslot.accessory.absorb_fire || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_fire || tslot.rightshield.absorb_fire || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_fire || tslot.leftshield.absorb_fire)) || (dcl.elementIce && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbIce, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_ice || tslot.body.absorb_ice || tslot.accessory.absorb_ice || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_ice || tslot.rightshield.absorb_ice || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_ice || tslot.leftshield.absorb_ice)) || (dcl.elementLightning && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbLightning, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_lightning || tslot.body.absorb_lightning || tslot.accessory.absorb_lightning || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_lightning || tslot.rightshield.absorb_lightning || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_lightning || tslot.leftshield.absorb_lightning)) || (dcl.elementWind && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbWind, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_wind || tslot.body.absorb_wind || tslot.accessory.absorb_wind || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_wind || tslot.rightshield.absorb_wind || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_wind || tslot.leftshield.absorb_wind)) || (dcl.elementEarth && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbEarth, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_earth || tslot.body.absorb_earth || tslot.accessory.absorb_earth || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_earth || tslot.rightshield.absorb_earth || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_earth || tslot.leftshield.absorb_earth)) || (dcl.elementWater && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbWater, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_water || tslot.body.absorb_water || tslot.accessory.absorb_water || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_water || tslot.rightshield.absorb_water || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_water || tslot.leftshield.absorb_water)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetNullResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && (mapOr(dclJobNullFire, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_fire || tslot.body.nullify_fire || tslot.accessory.nullify_fire || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_fire || tslot.rightshield.nullify_fire || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_fire || tslot.leftshield.nullify_fire)) || (dcl.elementIce && (mapOr(dclJobNullIce, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_ice || tslot.body.nullify_ice || tslot.accessory.nullify_ice || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_ice || tslot.rightshield.nullify_ice || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_ice || tslot.leftshield.nullify_ice)) || (dcl.elementLightning && (mapOr(dclJobNullLightning, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_lightning || tslot.body.nullify_lightning || tslot.accessory.nullify_lightning || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_lightning || tslot.rightshield.nullify_lightning || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_lightning || tslot.leftshield.nullify_lightning)) || (dcl.elementWind && (mapOr(dclJobNullWind, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_wind || tslot.body.nullify_wind || tslot.accessory.nullify_wind || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_wind || tslot.rightshield.nullify_wind || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_wind || tslot.leftshield.nullify_wind)) || (dcl.elementEarth && (mapOr(dclJobNullEarth, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_earth || tslot.body.nullify_earth || tslot.accessory.nullify_earth || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_earth || tslot.rightshield.nullify_earth || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_earth || tslot.leftshield.nullify_earth)) || (dcl.elementWater && (mapOr(dclJobNullWater, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_water || tslot.body.nullify_water || tslot.accessory.nullify_water || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_water || tslot.rightshield.nullify_water || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_water || tslot.leftshield.nullify_water)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetHalveResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && (mapOr(dclJobHalveFire, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_fire || tslot.body.halve_fire || tslot.accessory.halve_fire || tslot.rightweapon.halve_fire || tslot.rightshield.halve_fire || tslot.leftweapon.halve_fire || tslot.leftshield.halve_fire)) || (dcl.elementIce && (mapOr(dclJobHalveIce, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_ice || tslot.body.halve_ice || tslot.accessory.halve_ice || tslot.rightweapon.halve_ice || tslot.rightshield.halve_ice || tslot.leftweapon.halve_ice || tslot.leftshield.halve_ice)) || (dcl.elementLightning && (mapOr(dclJobHalveLightning, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_lightning || tslot.body.halve_lightning || tslot.accessory.halve_lightning || tslot.rightweapon.halve_lightning || tslot.rightshield.halve_lightning || tslot.leftweapon.halve_lightning || tslot.leftshield.halve_lightning)) || (dcl.elementWind && (mapOr(dclJobHalveWind, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_wind || tslot.body.halve_wind || tslot.accessory.halve_wind || tslot.rightweapon.halve_wind || tslot.rightshield.halve_wind || tslot.leftweapon.halve_wind || tslot.leftshield.halve_wind)) || (dcl.elementEarth && (mapOr(dclJobHalveEarth, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_earth || tslot.body.halve_earth || tslot.accessory.halve_earth || tslot.rightweapon.halve_earth || tslot.rightshield.halve_earth || tslot.leftweapon.halve_earth || tslot.leftshield.halve_earth)) || (dcl.elementWater && (mapOr(dclJobHalveWater, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_water || tslot.body.halve_water || tslot.accessory.halve_water || tslot.rightweapon.halve_water || tslot.rightshield.halve_water || tslot.leftweapon.halve_water || tslot.leftshield.halve_water)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetWeakResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && ((mapOr(dclJobWeakFire, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_fire || tslot.body.weak_fire || tslot.accessory.weak_fire || tslot.rightweapon.weak_fire || tslot.rightshield.weak_fire || tslot.leftweapon.weak_fire || tslot.leftshield.weak_fire || t.status.oil))) || (dcl.elementIce && (mapOr(dclJobWeakIce, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_ice || tslot.body.weak_ice || tslot.accessory.weak_ice || tslot.rightweapon.weak_ice || tslot.rightshield.weak_ice || tslot.leftweapon.weak_ice || tslot.leftshield.weak_ice)) || (dcl.elementLightning && (mapOr(dclJobWeakLightning, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_lightning || tslot.body.weak_lightning || tslot.accessory.weak_lightning || tslot.rightweapon.weak_lightning || tslot.rightshield.weak_lightning || tslot.leftweapon.weak_lightning || tslot.leftshield.weak_lightning)) || (dcl.elementWind && (mapOr(dclJobWeakWind, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_wind || tslot.body.weak_wind || tslot.accessory.weak_wind || tslot.rightweapon.weak_wind || tslot.rightshield.weak_wind || tslot.leftweapon.weak_wind || tslot.leftshield.weak_wind)) || (dcl.elementEarth && (mapOr(dclJobWeakEarth, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_earth || tslot.body.weak_earth || tslot.accessory.weak_earth || tslot.rightweapon.weak_earth || tslot.rightshield.weak_earth || tslot.leftweapon.weak_earth || tslot.leftshield.weak_earth)) || (dcl.elementWater && (mapOr(dclJobWeakWater, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_water || tslot.body.weak_water || tslot.accessory.weak_water || tslot.rightweapon.weak_water || tslot.rightshield.weak_water || tslot.leftweapon.weak_water || tslot.leftshield.weak_water)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetStrongResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && (tslot.head.strong_fire || tslot.body.strong_fire || tslot.accessory.strong_fire || tslot.rightweapon.strong_fire || tslot.rightshield.strong_fire || tslot.leftweapon.strong_fire || tslot.leftshield.strong_fire)) || (dcl.elementIce && (tslot.head.strong_ice || tslot.body.strong_ice || tslot.accessory.strong_ice || tslot.rightweapon.strong_ice || tslot.rightshield.strong_ice || tslot.leftweapon.strong_ice || tslot.leftshield.strong_ice)) || (dcl.elementLightning && (tslot.head.strong_lightning || tslot.body.strong_lightning || tslot.accessory.strong_lightning || tslot.rightweapon.strong_lightning || tslot.rightshield.strong_lightning || tslot.leftweapon.strong_lightning || tslot.leftshield.strong_lightning)) || (dcl.elementWind && (tslot.head.strong_wind || tslot.body.strong_wind || tslot.accessory.strong_wind || tslot.rightweapon.strong_wind || tslot.rightshield.strong_wind || tslot.leftweapon.strong_wind || tslot.leftshield.strong_wind)) || (dcl.elementEarth && (tslot.head.strong_earth || tslot.body.strong_earth || tslot.accessory.strong_earth || tslot.rightweapon.strong_earth || tslot.rightshield.strong_earth || tslot.leftweapon.strong_earth || tslot.leftshield.strong_earth)) || (dcl.elementWater && (tslot.head.strong_water || tslot.body.strong_water || tslot.accessory.strong_water || tslot.rightweapon.strong_water || tslot.rightshield.strong_water || tslot.leftweapon.strong_water || tslot.leftshield.strong_water)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.elementPermilleResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(dcl.targetNullResolved, 0, if(dcl.targetHalveResolved, const.dclAffinityHalvePermille, if(dcl.targetWeakResolved, const.dclAffinityWeakPermille, if(dcl.targetStrongResolved, const.dclAffinityStrongPermille, 1000))))

DclHealingFormula: if(dcl.isMagicDamage && dcl.magicAbsorbedResolved, if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, dcl.magicAmountResolved, 0), if(dcl.isMagicHeal, if(dcl.nativeHpCreditResult, if(t.status.undead, 0, dcl.magicAmountResolved), 0), if(dcl.nativeHpCreditResult, dcl.oldCredit, 0)))
DclPreviewDamageFormula: if(action.abilityId == 101, ability.dcl.power * const.dclPummelPreviewAverageHits, if(dcl.isMagicDamage, if(dcl.magicAbsorbedResolved || dcl.targetNullResolved, 0, dcl.magicAmountResolved), if(action.type == 1 && action.abilityId == 0, dcl.weaponModel, if(dcl.isMagicHeal && t.status.undead, dcl.magicAmountResolved, 0))))
DclPreviewHealingFormula: if(dcl.isMagicDamage && dcl.magicAbsorbedResolved, dcl.magicAmountResolved, if(dcl.isMagicHeal, if(t.status.undead, 0, dcl.magicAmountResolved), 0))

DclStatusRules.Name: DCL Taunt fallback via Berserk carrier

DclMpDebitFormula: if(t.charId == 31 && dcl.nativeMpDebitResult && dcl.oldDebit == 0 && dcl.oldMpDebit > 1, min(t.mp, max(1, dcl.oldMpDebit / 2)), if(dcl.nativeMpDebitResult, dcl.oldMpDebit, 0))

DclReactionRules.Name: Unified sentinel Mana Shield neutral chance

DclReactionMaterializationProbeExpectedB: 48 8B CB E8 6F F0 FF FF 0F B7 35 24 7E 5E 01
